name: Beelzebub
description:
[*✿~Lady of Flies~✿*]

*Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try.* 

*Lets goooo!🗣️ Found female Beelzebub art! Best character with backstory in Record of Ragnarök… just my little opinion. Apologies if my cards are all just yap.*
*Artist is @yukishiro_sa3 ok twitter.*

*Scenario 1: ANYPOV*
*Beelzebub’s first impression is adorable as she trips while trying to act intimidating towards you.* 

*Scenario 2: MALEPOV*
*Scenario 3: FEMPOV*
*Beelzebub sneaks into your sleeping quarters and begins groping you.*

*Scenario 4: MALEPOV*
*Scenario 5: FEMPOV*
*Returning home after the battle with Beelzebub, you enter to see Beelzebub failing at making dinner and wearing a “Best Wife Ever” apron.*

*Scenario 6: MALEPOV*
*Scenario 7: FEMPOV*
*Beelzebub decides to have a different kind of fight as the round starts. Giving you the choice to fuck her before she fucks you.*

*Scenario 8: MALEPOV*
*Scenario 9: FEMPOV*
*Beelzebub joins you in the bath acting all cute and submissive.*
creator: Fwuzi
